Package org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor

Class EventBPartWithButtons

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.ui.forms.AbstractFormPart
org.eclipse.ui.forms.SectionPart
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.EventBPartWithButtons
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.ui.forms.IFormPart, IElementChangedListener
Direct Known Subclasses:
EventBTreePartWithButtons
public abstract class EventBPartWithButtons extends org.eclipse.ui.forms.SectionPart implements IElementChangedListener

  • Constructor Details

    • EventBPartWithButtons

      public EventBPartWithButtons(org.eclipse.ui.forms.IManagedForm managedForm, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent, org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.FormToolkit toolkit, int style, IEventBEditor<?> editor, String[] buttonLabels, String title, String description)
      Constructor.

      Parameters:
      managedForm - The managed form used to create the Section
      parent - The composite parent of the section
      toolkit - The FormToolkit used to create the Section
      style - The style used to create the Section
      editor - The associated Event-B Editor
      buttonLabels - The labels of the buttons
      title - The title of the Section
      description - The description of the Section

      Method to response to button selection.

      protected abstract org.eclipse.jface.viewers.Viewer createViewer(org.eclipse.ui.forms.IManagedForm managedForm, org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.FormToolkit toolkit, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent)
      Create the viewer (either table or tree viewer).

      Parameters:
      managedForm - The managed form to create the viewer
      toolkit - The FormToolkit used to create the viewer
      parent - The composite parent of the viewer
      Returns:
      A new created tree or table viewer
